---
title: "Sustainable Views"
page-layout: article
---

# Sustainable Views

## Description

Financial Times publication covering sustainable finance, ESG policy, regulation, and market trends. Supports research on sustainability, investment, and corporate responsibility.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data

## Access notes

Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://search.library.yale.edu/catalog/17660885)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
